cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking what the author did when he met Mr. Lee. Looking back at the passage, the author describes a situation where he was walking with his mother and they encountered Mr. Lee. The key part here is that the author didn't pay any attention to Mr. Lee because he thought he could see him anytime in the neighborhood. So he didn't do anything special at that moment. Then, after passing Mr. Lee, his mother scolded him for not speaking to him. The answer choices are: (A) He talked with somebody else. (B) He was attracted by a dog. (C) He greeted him politely.
